turns.user_message: I tried to shake this feeling off, but it just stuck around. It used to be so easy to just move on from a bad day.
Now that tight, restless feeling follows me everywhere I go. I can't remember what it's like to feel truly calm anymore.
My heart starts pounding over nothing and my thoughts spiral out of control. It feels like I'm losing my grip on everything.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better. This used to not bother the speaker.
